question: Write a C++ program that declares an `integer` array of size 10. Prompt the user to enter 10 integer values to populate the array. After reading all inputs, find and print the largest element present in the array.

test_cases.expected: The largest element in the array is: 10
The largest element in the array is: 0
The largest element in the array is: 1000

driver: The main function of the C++ program.
errors: The 'max_val' variable is initialized to 0. If all input numbers are negative, the program will incorrectly report 0 as the largest element instead of the actual largest negative number.
